messages.no_feature: No active spec-kit feature resolved. Run /speckit.specify first or switch to the feature branch.

context: Scan available Claude Code agents and assign them to tasks in tasks.md. Must run before validate and execute.
pre.title: /speckit.agent.assign.assign -- before you run this

context: Execute tasks by spawning the assigned agent for each task in its own context. Replaces the deprecated /speckit.implement. Requires agent-assignments.md (assign) and a passing validate run.
pre.title: /speckit.agent.assign.execute -- before you run this

context: Validate that all agent assignments in agent-assignments.md are correct and that the assigned agents exist. Must run before execute.
pre.title: /speckit.agent.assign.validate -- before you run this

context: Surfaces risks, missing tasks, and over-broad tasks.
pre.title: /speckit.analyze -- before you run this

context: Terminal step; moves specs/<feat>/ to archived/.
pre.title: /speckit.archive -- before you run this

context: Applies the fix; reruns the failing test to confirm.
pre.title: /speckit.bugfix.patch -- before you run this

context: Reproduces the bug with a failing test before patching.
pre.title: /speckit.bugfix.verify -- before you run this

context: Locks in spec/plan/tasks before or after execution.
pre.title: /speckit.checkpoint.commit -- before you run this

context: Resolves ambiguities left open in spec.md.
pre.title: /speckit.clarify -- before you run this

context: Create or update the project constitution.
pre.title: /speckit.constitution -- before you run this

context: Closes gap between spec intent and actual implementation.
pre.title: /speckit.converge -- before you run this

context: Cross-model evaluation of plan.md and tasks.md.
pre.title: /speckit.fleet.review -- before you run this

context: Deprecated. Route implementation through /speckit.agent-assign-assign then /speckit.agent-assign-validate then /speckit.agent-assign-execute instead.
hard_deprecated: /speckit.implement is deprecated in this project. See gates.yaml for the recommended replacement.
pre.title: /speckit.implement -- before you run this

context: Applies iteration intent to spec + plan + tasks.
pre.title: /speckit.iterate.apply -- before you run this

context: Scope/intent pivots distinct from incremental refine.
pre.title: /speckit.iterate.define -- before you run this

context: Captures durable lessons from completed work.
pre.title: /speckit.memory.md.capture -- before you run this

context: Decomposes spec into design and implementation plan.
pre.title: /speckit.plan -- before you run this

context: Systematic QA: browser-driven or CLI-based acceptance.
pre.title: /speckit.qa.run -- before you run this

context: Pushes spec diff into plan, tasks, and issues.
pre.title: /speckit.refine.propagate -- before you run this

context: Security risks introduced by the current branch.
pre.title: /speckit.security.review.branch -- before you run this

context: Initial spec authoring; must precede all other phases.
pre.title: /speckit.specify -- before you run this

context: Decomposes plan into discrete, testable tasks.
pre.title: /speckit.tasks -- before you run this

context: Turns tasks into trackable GitHub issues.
pre.title: /speckit.taskstoissues -- before you run this

context: Implements a small change directly from its tinyspec.
pre.title: /speckit.tinyspec.implement -- before you run this

context: Lightweight spec for small, self-contained changes.
pre.title: /speckit.tinyspec.tinyspec -- before you run this

context: Non-destructive post-implementation verification gate. Validates the implementation against spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, and constitution.md. Runs as a local speckit-verify agent (spawned as a sub-agent).
pre.title: /speckit.verify -- before you run this

context: Detects phantom completions in a fresh context to avoid confirmation bias. Verifies that tasks marked [X] in tasks.md are backed by real implementation. Runs as a local speckit-verify-tasks agent.
pre.title: /speckit.verify.tasks -- before you run this
